testcase.name: test_mira_chat_creates_service_flow

failure.message: AssertionError: Chat should succeed assert None == True + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc8b045b9ac0>('success') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc8b045b9ac0> = {'concierge_action': {'action_needed': True, 'action_type': 'care_appointment', 'category': 'care', 'navigate_to': '/groom', ...}, 'disclaimer_shown': False, 'end_state': 'RESPONDED', 'handoff': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_service_flow_soul_score.py:156: in test_mira_chat_creates_service_flow assert chat_data.get("success") == True, "Chat should succeed" E AssertionError: Chat should succeed E assert None == True E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc8b045b9ac0>('success') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc8b045b9ac0> = {'concierge_action': {'action_needed': True, 'action_type': 'care_appointment', 'category': 'care', 'navigate_to': '/groom', ...}, 'disclaimer_shown': False, 'end_state': 'RESPONDED', 'handoff': None, ...}.get

testcase.name: test_attach_or_create_ticket_endpoint

failure.message:
AssertionError: Pillar should be Grooming assert 'Celebrate' == 'Grooming'
- Grooming + Celebrate

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_service_flow_soul_score.py:283: in test_attach_or_create_ticket_endpoint assert ticket_data.get("pillar") == "Grooming", "Pillar should be Grooming" E AssertionError: Pillar should be Grooming E assert 'Celebrate' == 'Grooming' E E - Grooming E + Celebrate
